reviews.review_title: Hello dear developers if you still
reviews.review_description: Hello dear developers if you can still see my five star review, can I please request you to launch this same app in meta quest 3. Please I love this app so much

I have tried a number of meditation experiences in the VR but I have to say this is one of my favourites. It is just long enough to be an affective experience that can be carried out daily. Before I had to use my imagination to experience the flow of colour into each chakra now it is there to see and experience in real time. For anyone who enjoys meditating or mindfulness exercises this is a must. Really well done to the developers!!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your review. We are a new team and we put our hearts into this. it really  means a lot to us that you enjoyed it. more coming soon. !

reviews.review_description: If your into Chakra this app is great ,very relaxing it takes you on a chakra journey, my wife used it and said it totally relaxed her .

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much we put a lot of work into this experience. We will be creating more and adding other experiences soon 
Namaste DPWichman

reviews.review_description: I had this on oculus go until it broke 😔 Can I transfer this to the quest 2 I recently bought?

For a newbie who is too ADHD to  meditate normally, combining this with headphones is such a great way to center myself and relax without all kinds of outside distractions! The best part is this app actually can help you train yourself to visualize the various chakras on your own and go through each energy level without the need for your headset after a few rounds of practice.
I absolutely love this app. Helps to clear my head, reset my energy & open my chakras. Would love to see more affordable apps from you. The content and quality is amazing!! Thank you!

I'm amazed. You actually created a so near perfect experience that helped this very tired crystal healer to recharge from more than you can imagine. Thank you...and anybody that comes across this app, by whatever means, buy it...just buy it, your life will thank you.

Hi, can you please create more videos like this? I love that they’re only $2.99. This video has been really healing my past pain so Thank you. My sister does sound bowl healing for people in NJ. I know she has been talking about doing a VR concept so perhaps you can use her recording and do something? She’s very talented. She has a passion and devotion also, just like you: https://www.theenchantedheart.com

I was skeptical when I first tried this I am a Christian and I don’t believe in anything supernatural except God. But I also believe that there are things in us that other people have explored and while I don’t believe you can reach these powers without God because God keeps you grounded. I have to say I believe that after hearing what is said this does concentrate on that which is good and God conscience even though it says the spirit I know what he’s talking about our life force our life energy. The graphics is beautiful the chanting is a little haunting but all in all I think that you can actually help yourself by using this VR program the graphics is very enjoyable and I was very relaxed after a while and I believe I actually fell asleep. Do I think this can help you, yes I do. Do I recommended yes I do. Each one of us are responsible for our own spirituality and this I believe can enhance the human mind body and spirit in one way or another.￼￼

This experience is, handsdown, one of the best ways to meditate you’ll ever find. I was so impressed with it I showed it to a friend of mine who lived in India for many years working under a Guru. She was flabbergasted! It’s incredibly beautiful and I think it gets better over time. The more used to the meditation you become the deeper the effect. Build it into your daily practice. You won’t regret it

Update: this continues to be the only reason I use my GO. I wish the developers would release it on Quest 2, because it’s a sensational meditation. I feel like it could have the capabilities to focus healing or love on another, or on a world issue… If you can still sideload the Temple of Sound by the same developer - that’s also wonderful.
This is my favorite app. Each time I do this I feel my chakras opening and the energy flow gets stronger every time. I love this experience ���

developer_response.body:
YES!!! YES!!! That is so awesome Thank you so very much we really put our hearts into this. We promise more updates and new content soon. Thank you so very very much !!! 
David & Todd @ Heal-VR

reviews.review_description: Impressive visuals but left wanting more. Would be nice to have different settings, backgrounds and please offer binaural beat choices! Lots of potential..high quality good work guys but feels like a movie rather then a app.
Simple but beautiful, I love this app. I use it most days. Is there any possibility of you developing other healing apps? Or expanding on this lovely experience?

developer_response.body: Hello Lexie, We are so happy to hear you are enjoying our Chakra VR app.  We are actually developing several new apps right now!  Keep checking Heal-VR.com or the Oculus store and you should see some new apps coming soon.

reviews.review_description: I just purchased this and then downloaded it to my go and it was an amazing experience! Thank you app developer! Namaste 🙏
It's okay so far, trying to do it while I'm my back instead of sitting Indian style, which I really can't do.
